content: yo why do you put murphy in good tier? in some lists they are rated really low

Only Caro to directly interface with Crimson Furnace (good), but that reduces his synergy in comparison to better caro limiteds (Gelot/Thais). Of the current caro limiteds (minus sorel cause moved to standard). He is the weakest. He's good, better than most standards. But as a limited caro, he has some impossibly good competition.
I created it to compare with units in the same group. Limited/Standard.
Not worth using your limited pulls on him, and he is the next caro to be added to standard
